description.value: Price 1,100 gp; Slot none; CL 10th; Weight â; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This +1 flaming holy arrow has a platinum arrowhead and brilliant white fletching. When the arrow successfully strikes an evil-aligned creature, it explodes in a shower of golden sparks that summons a swarm of celestial doves (treat as a celestial bat swarm ) that continues to attack the arrowâs target for 10 rounds or until destroyed or dismissed. If the target is slain before the duration expires, the remaining doves fly off into the horizon. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 550 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells flame strike, holy smite, summon swarm; Special creator must be good
